title: Reposition Salesforce Object Selector Below Navigation Bar
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the 'Your Salesforce Object' selector to appear after the navigation bar, so that the page layout is consistent across all screens and navigation clarity is improved.
description:
The 'Your Salesforce Object' row was positioned before the navigation links, which was inconsistent with other screens. Moving it below the navigation bar improves layout clarity and maintains a consistent page structure.

The same layout adjustment was also applied to the Metrics page (related to MBT-151) where the navigation links appeared after the add form instead of before it.
acceptance_criteria: The 'Your Salesforce Object' selector row appears below the navigation bar on the Select page
Navigation links appear before the object selector consistently across all screens
Metrics page navigation links are repositioned above the add form for consistency
ux_changes: Repositioned the 'Your Salesforce Object' selector to appear below the navigation bar on the Select page. Applied the same navigation-first layout to the Metrics page for cross-screen consistency.
implementation_notes: DOM element reordering in the page templates. The navigation bar now consistently appears first, followed by context-specific content like the object selector or add form.
comment_summary: Developer applied the layout change to both the Select page and the Metrics page for consistency. Screenshots provided confirming the updated layout. Change was approved.
